overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in period clothing walking through a muddy historic city street resembling New Orleans French Quarter, passing horse-drawn carriages and historic buildings before entering a cemetery with above-ground tombs.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic urban street with muddy road and wooden sidewalks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy street between historic brick and wooden buildings

entered.detail: multi-story brick buildings with wrought iron balconies and shuttered windows
weathered wooden facades with balconies and external staircases
wet muddy road with puddles reflecting the overcast sky
wooden telegraph poles with crossbars lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a muddy historic street flanked by multi-story brick buildings on the left and wooden structures on the right. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting over the wet road surface as the camera follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic intersection with passing horse traffic

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with white horse passes from left to right crossing the street ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street and turning slightly right at the intersection as a carriage passes

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving from left to right across the intersection

entered.detail: prominent two-story building with wrap-around wrought iron balcony at the street corner
ornate black iron street lamp on the wooden sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street intersection where a horse-drawn carriage crosses from left to right. The camera turns slightly right, passing a prominent corner building with an ornate balcony while maintaining a steady walking pace through the muddy streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area approaching cemetery with general store

agents.ego_description: walking past the general store toward the cemetery entrance at the edge of town

entered.detail: wooden building with covered porch and 'ELYWN' signage painted on the facade
ornate wrought iron gate entrance to the cemetery visible ahead
high stone wall surrounding the cemetery grounds

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Elywn General Store on the left as the urban density decreases. The cemetery stone wall runs along the right side, leading toward an ornate iron gate entrance visible in the distance, with trees becoming visible beyond the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cemetery with above-ground tombs and oak trees

events.description: character opens the iron gate and enters the cemetery, transitioning from street to tomb-lined path

agents.ego_description: opening the iron cemetery gate and entering, walking between rows of above-ground tombs

notable_agents.action: man in yellow shirt standing near the cemetery gate entrance

entered.detail: wrought iron gate that the character opens to enter the cemetery grounds
row of above-ground stone mausoleums with arched tops lining the left path
row of historic above-ground tombs with decorative stonework on the right
mature oak trees with spreading branches providing canopy cover over the cemetery

segments.scene_description: The character opens the wrought iron gate and enters the cemetery, leaving the muddy street behind. Inside, the path is lined with historic above-ground stone tombs on both sides beneath a canopy of large oak trees, creating a sheltered, enclosed atmosphere distinct from the open street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a muddy, overcast city street into the sheltered enclosure of a historic cemetery. It begins by following a character through a corridor of brick and wooden buildings under a diffused gray sky, moving steadily along the wet road. As the character reaches an intersection, the camera turns slightly to pass an ornate balcony while a horse-drawn carriage crosses the path. The scene then opens up as the urban density decreases past a general store, with the camera tracking along a stone wall toward a distant wrought iron gate. Finally, the character opens the gate and steps off the muddy street into a quiet sanctuary of above-ground stone tombs shaded by a canopy of large oak trees.
